name: Patty Ann's Scotch Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Refrigerate.
2. Preheat oven to 325°F.
3. Sift the dry ingredients together and set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, cream butter and sugar until smooth.
5. Add the sifted dry ingredients and mix well.
6. Chill until easy to handle.
7. Roll out to 1/4 inch thickness on a lightly floured board or wax paper.
8. Cut into desired shapes (e.g., bird cutter, Christmas tree).
9. Bake on an ungreased sheet at 325°F for 10-15 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with colored sugars if desired before baking.
